response.justification: Candidate is significantly overqualified for an entry-level position, with 15+ years of experience and current Staff Software Engineer title. Location in Lagos, Nigeria conflicts with the high on-site presence requirement (role appears Germany-based). While technical skills strongly align (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS), the seniority mismatch creates high risk of compensation misalignment, short tenure, and disengagement on junior-level tasks. Specific stack gaps include no PostgreSQL (uses MongoDB/MySQL) and no Nest.js experience.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and React fullstack experience across multiple companies
AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD exposure align with nice-to-haves
Demonstrated interest in clean architecture, TDD, and software craftsmanship
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff/Senior level applying to entry-level role
Location (Lagos, Nigeria) incompatible with high on-site presence requirement
No PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience; primary DB experience is MongoDB
